title: Past continuous with when
subtitle: Tell an interrupted action.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: I was studying when you called.
你打电话时我正在学习。
She was walking home when it started to rain.
开始下雨时，她正在走路回家。
What were you doing when I called?
我打电话时你在做什么？
I was studying when you called.
你打电话时我正在学习。

items.en: I was studying when you called.
items.zh: 你打电话时我正在学习。

items.en: She was walking home when it started to rain.
items.zh: 开始下雨时，她正在走路回家。

items.en: What were you doing when I called?
items.zh: 我打电话时你在做什么？

items.en: I was studying when you called.
items.zh: 你打电话时我正在学习。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What were you doing when I called?
lines.zh: 我打电话时你在做什么？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: I was studying when you called.
lines.zh: 你打电话时我正在学习。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: She was walking home when it started to rain.
lines.zh: 开始下雨时，她正在走路回家。

items.en: I was studying when you called.
items.zh: 你打电话时我正在学习。

items.en: She was walking home when it started to rain.
items.zh: 开始下雨时，她正在走路回家。

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
